title: Add Customer Logo Bar
description: Create a horizontal bar of customer logos that go from grayscale to color on hover.
solution: Display logos in a flex row. Apply filter: grayscale(100%). On hover: filter: grayscale(0%).

title: Build an FAQ Accordion Section
description: Add a collapsible FAQ section with smooth open/close animations.
requirements: Only one open at a time OR multiple
solution: Each FAQ item has a button (question) and a div (answer). On click, toggle max-height from 0 to 500px. Use aria-expanded for accessibility.

title: Implement Animated Counter Statistics
description: Create number counters that animate from 0 to their target value when scrolled into view.
requirements: Animate to target on scroll into view
solution: Observe stat element. On intersect, animate from 0 to target using requestAnimationFrame incrementing by delta/duration. Display formatted number.
